title: Lives of the Philosophers: The Seven Sages
description: The biographies and sayings of the earliest Greek philosophers — from Thales' 'Know thyself' to Solon's 'Nothing in excess.'
introduction: The biographies and sayings of the earliest Greek philosophers — from Thales' 'Know thyself' to Solon's 'Nothing in excess.'

translation.text: Thales said the most difficult thing in the world is to know yourself, and the easiest is to give advice to others.
